description_long: This is an adult male figure dressed in formal business attire, featuring a pinstriped suit jacket and matching trousers. He wears a collared dress shirt with a patterned necktie, and a pocket square is visible in his jacket's breast pocket. The figure's posture is upright, with arms slightly bent and hands open, as if gesturing or in mid-conversation. His shoes are formal and polished, complementing the professional appearance. The hairstyle is neatly combed and parted to the side, giving a well-groomed look. No accessories or carried objects are visible, and the overall impression is that of a business professional in an urban environment.
description: A well-dressed adult male in a pinstriped business suit, collared shirt, and tie, standing upright with a formal, professional appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the suit, tie, shirt, pocket square, and facial features with arms slightly forward.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the suit's fit, and the arm's gesture.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the suit jacket, trousers, and neatly styled hair.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the suit's side profile, arm gesture, and the back of the head.
attribute_clothing_type: business suit with collared dress shirt and necktie
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms slightly bent
